sourceSummary.oneLine: Chunk lists detector BOM and purchase data for S4335-W/S4343-W assemblies, including power, labels, panel, PBA, Wi-Fi, safety-standard-marked cables, and component specifications.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR traceability for purchased detector materials, assembly hierarchy, supplier identification, safety-relevant component specifications, and BOM cost records.
keyPoints: S4335-W accessory BOM includes CAT7 LAN cable, IEC60332-1 signal harness, and a UL-marked AC/DC detector power supply.
S4335-W_R1 detector assemblies are broken down into front, back cover, middle, module, panel, and PBA gate/ROIC assemblies.
Safety/performance-related parts include Li-ion polymer battery, shock indicators, Wi-Fi antennas, EMI gasket, thermal pads, power regulators, and TFT sensor panel.
Spreadsheet contains multiple formula/reference errors such as #REF! and #N/A in calculated fields.

entities.name: S4335-W
entities.evidence: Rows list 제품명 S4335-W with ACCESSORY, FRONT ASSY, BACK COVER ASSY, PANEL ASSY, and PBA assemblies.

entities.name: S4335-W_R1
entities.evidence: Assemblies include ASSY TOP-S4335-W_R1_FEMALE DETECTOR ASSY, S4335-W_R1 PANEL ASSY, GATEIC PBA, and ROIC PBA.

entities.name: S4343-W
entities.evidence: Rows list S4343-W GATEIC BOARD, ROIC BOARD, MAIN PCB, and S4343-W_FEMALE detector assemblies.

entities.name: SDR-C4335W
entities.evidence: LABEL ID-SDR-C4335W and BATTERY;SDR-C4335W, Li-ion Polymer, 3400mA are listed.

entities.name: DAEAN ELECOM CO., LTD
entities.evidence: Supplier for SMPS-2G_DETECTOR_POWER_BOX DEPS9601 and PBA POWER DEPS9602.

entities.name: HANSUNG P&I CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: Supplier for detector ID labels, caution label, blank label, and deco plates.

entities.name: DAEJIN IM CO.,LTD
entities.evidence: Supplier for R1 back cover, front cover, and middle block assemblies.

entities.name: CANON ELECTRON TUBES & DEVICES CO.
entities.evidence: Listed for TFT-SENSOR PANEL FM3543S-D6S/A and FM4343S-D6S/A.

entities.name: SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: Listed for NETWORK-MAIN_WIFI MODULE SQL-Q93 / SWL-Q93 and ceramic capacitor CL31A106KBHNNNE.

entities.name: TEXAS INSTRUMENTS KOREA LTD.
entities.evidence: Listed for CMOS logic, analog switch, clock driver, and power regulator ICs in PBA assemblies.

concepts.name: Safety-marked power supply
concepts.evidence: SMPS-2G_DETECTOR_POWER_BOX spec includes AC/DC, 48W, AC220V, 50-60Hz, DC16V, +10to+40C, UL.

concepts.name: Internationally marked power cord
concepts.evidence: POWER CORD-DT spec lists EUR, 250V, 10A, H05VV-F 3x0.75mm2, CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI.

concepts.name: Detector panel assembly
concepts.evidence: ASSY SUB MATERIAL-S4335-W_R1 PANEL ASSY includes TFT-SENSOR PANEL INX 1417 and deposition process.

concepts.name: PBA gate/ROIC assemblies
concepts.pageTarget: S4335-W PBA assemblies / MI92-02451A and MI92-02453A
concepts.evidence: Rows define ASSY PBA-INTERFACE-GATEIC and ASSY PBA-INTERFACE-ROIC with SMD subassemblies and electronic components.

concepts.name: Wireless antenna performance
concepts.pageTarget: S4335-W front assembly / MI42-01001A and MI42-01002A
concepts.evidence: Wi-Fi antenna specs list 2.45/5.4GHz with -11.0/-15dBi and -8.0/-8.0dBi values.

concepts.name: Shock handling indicator
concepts.evidence: Indicator spec states SHOCK SENSOR, CX-30(TUBE), activation at 19 inch to 30 inch, 100G.

evidence.claim: The S4335-W accessory BOM includes an IEC60332-1 signal harness.
The S4335-W accessory BOM includes a UL-marked detector power supply with AC/DC 48W, AC220V input, and DC16V output.
The accessory power cord is specified for 250V, 10A and lists CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI markings.
The S4335-W accessory BOM includes a CAT7 LAN cable.
The detector BOM includes a Li-ion polymer battery for SDR-C4335W.
evidence.evidenceText: MI96-01305B, "BATTERY;SDR-C4335W,Li-ion Polymer,3400mA", supplier ELENTEC CO,. LTD., P/N SDB-3S1PA

evidence.claim: S4335-W_R1 panel assembly includes TFT sensor panel INX 1417 and CsI/TlI deposition material assumptions.
evidence.evidenceText: S4335-W, MI99-01267A, PANEL ASSY; MI59-01110A TFT-SENSOR PANEL, INX 1417; deposition note "CsI 6kg, TlI 60g...LOSS 20%"

evidence.claim: The front assembly includes Wi-Fi antennas specified for 2.45/5.4GHz operation.
evidence.evidenceText: MI42-01001A and MI42-01002A list FPCB ANTENNA CHIP specs "2.45/5.4GHz" with dBi values.

evidence.claim: The module assembly includes shock indicators with 100G activation reference.
The PBA interface gate assembly includes a gate PCB made from FR4 with 6 layers and 1.2 mm thickness.
The PBA interface ROIC assembly includes components rated across extended temperature ranges.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC PBA rows include BAT54SW diode, 74LVC1G04 -40to+125, CDCLVD1212 -40to+85C, ADR444B -40to+125C, and regulators to -45to+125C.

evidence.claim: The middle assembly includes an EMI gasket for detector grounding.
The spreadsheet contains unresolved reference/formula errors in calculated columns.
evidence.evidenceText: Multiple rows show #REF! and #N/A in confirmation/formula/calculated amount fields.

reviewFlags.reason: Chunk is a partial spreadsheet extraction; column headers are present mid-chunk and some earlier rows lack explicit headers, so document-level interpretation is limited to supported BOM/purchase facts.
Multiple #REF! and #N/A values appear in formula and calculated amount fields, indicating spreadsheet calculation or lookup issues.
Document date is inferred from the filename Detector(자사_1G)구매_20191018.xlsx, not from a visible spreadsheet cell in this chunk.
